name: delete_resource
description: Delete one or more assets from your Cloudinary account by their public IDs. Supports bulk deletion of up to 100 assets in a single request.

parameters.name: public_ids
parameters.description: Array of public IDs to delete (up to 100).

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: The resource type: image, video, or raw.

parameters.name: invalidate
parameters.description: Whether to also invalidate the CDN cache for these assets.
